title: PromptScape Nova: Create, optimize & organize AI prompts for every AI model | Product Hunt
excerpt: PromptScape Nova is the all-in-one AI prompt workspace for creators, developers, marketers, and teams. Discover, generate, optimize, test, organize, and share prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, Midjourney, Flux, Stable Diffusion, and 100+ AI tools. With 40+ categories, smart prompt optimization, reusable collections, and collaboration features, PromptScape Nova helps you get better AI results in seconds.
content_html: PromptScape Nova is the all-in-one AI prompt workspace for creators, developers, marketers, and teams. Discover, generate, optimize, test, organize, and share prompts for ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, Midjourney, Flux, Stable Diffusion, and 100+ AI tools. content_html_zh: PromptScape Nova 是一款面向创作者、开发者、营销人员和团队的一体化 AI 提示工作区。 发现、生成、优化、测试、组织和共享 ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini、Grok、Midjourney、Flux、Stable Diffusion 和 100 多种 AI 工具的提示。 PromptScape Nova 拥有 40 多个类别、智能提示优化、可重复使用的集合和协作功能，可帮助您在几秒钟内获得更好的 AI 结果。
